# The Gay Science

*[Nietzsche](../philosophers/nietzsche.md) · 1882*

A collection of joyful, incisive aphorisms, it is the work where the announcement of the death of God and the thought of eternal recurrence first appear. Nietzsche blends in it a critique of morality, a theory of knowledge, and an art of living.
